event_read.occasion: student and professional design mixer / networking event
event_read.venue: bright design-forward indoor venue with an approachable creative-studio feel, not a formal ballroom
constraints: career-focused social event rather than a party

wardrobe_note: The current source bundle is a mix of product images and outfit collages rather than literal full-body mirror try-on photos. Score the outfit logic against the visible garments and collage combinations.

items: light blue or dusty-blue tailored blazer
why: matches the networking-oriented semi-formal creative setting
looks polished without reading as stiff corporate businesswear
aligns with the user's clean, minimal preferences
feels more intentional than the chore-jacket-and-sneakers option

weaker_options.reason: olive chore-jacket styling with dark jeans and white sneakers reads too casual for a student / professional mixer
the black dress-led collage reads more fashion-shoot / occasionwear than the invite's polished but approachable networking vibe

acceptable_minor_adjustments: leave the blazer open for a relaxed networking look
prefer the polished black shoes over white sneakers
